fieldGroups.description: Past medical history, caregiver support, living situation, immunizations, and supplementals.

fieldGroups.label: Low Priority Admin Reference
fieldGroups.description: Identity, agency, physician, and demographic reference values that should not dominate QA.

textSpans.text: *Pertinent documentation to follow, please notify if additional information is required*
RIGHT SHODULDER ARTHROSCOPIC ROTATOR CUFF REPAIR - SEE TITACHED
BRADFORD, M.D. - HOLMAN CHAN, M.D. - KEVIN GOLSHANI, M.D.
KOTECKI, M.D. - KEVIN LAROCHE, M.D. - JUSTIN LIMTONG, D.O.
Ashley Harrington, PA-C - Simon Hwang, PA-C - Dalton Laut, PA-C - Paul A.
Rhoden, PA-C - Jessica Russian, APRN - Jason A.
Anoro Ellipta (62.5-25mcg/actuat Blister, With I, inhalation) Active.
albuterol sulfate (90mcg/actuat HFA Aerosol Inh, inhalation) Active.
No pertinent past surgical history Phreesia 07/02/2025
Current work status: Not Currently Employed Phreesia 07/02/2025
Assistance Status: Home Assistance Available Phreesia 07/02/2025
Surgical Blood Transfusion: Does not approve surgical blood transfusion Phreesia 07/02/2025
Alcohol use: Occasional Alcohol Use Phreesia 07/02/2025
Drug Assessment: No Illicit Drug Use Phreesia 07/02/2025
History Note: She has right shoulder pain since she was knocked over by dogs
She has multiple stents and valves and cannot get an MRI
Right shoulder CT arthrogram shows a full-thickness rotator cuff tear 15 mm X 15 mm
General Not Present- Chills and Fever.
Neurological Not Present- Loss of Consciousness.
The right shoulder was examined, there is no redness there is no warmth.
flexion is full and active active forward flexion is 90°.
Passive lateral abduction is full and active lateral abduction is 90°.
tenderness to palpation over the deltoid tuberosity.
Nontender to palpation over the a.c. joint.
Has a positive drop arm test.
CT arthrogram was reviewed including images and there is a full-thickness rotator cuff tear.
Warned of the risks of surgery including but not limited to death stroke disability blood clot infection and septic arthritis
osteomyelitis re tear need for repeat surgery.
All questions were asked and answered.
I explained that no guarantees can be made regarding the results of surgery.
activity in which they need to be of sound mind.
Assessment is right rotator cuff tear chronic
Plan is right arthroscopic rotator cuff repair of a chronic retracted tear
